title: Golden Cross 50/200 SMA trend following on NIFTY index proxy
instrument: India-adaptable; tested on clean local NIFTY index daily OHLC as signal-validation proxy
rules: Go long when 50-DMA crosses above 200-DMA; enter next open; exit next open when 50-DMA crosses below 200-DMA; 100% index exposure; 5 bps per side.
caveats: First-pass daily-bar research; benchmark comparison included; local data caveats apply.

title: Donchian channel breakout / Turtle-style trend following, adapted to NIFTY 50 stocks
instrument: India-adaptable; tested on local NIFTY 50 stock daily OHLC
rules: 20-day Donchian breakout: close crosses above prior 20-day high; enter next open; exit next open after close crosses below prior 10-day low; equal 1/50 slots; 5 bps per side.
caveats: First-pass daily-bar research; benchmark comparison included; local data caveats apply.

title: Larry Connors 2-period RSI mean reversion, adapted to NIFTY 50 stocks
instrument: India-direct source site; India-adapted rule on local NIFTY 50 stock daily OHLC
rules: Long only when close > 200-DMA and RSI(2) < 10; enter next open; exit next open after close > 5-DMA; equal 1/50 symbol slots; 5 bps per side.
caveats: First-pass daily-bar research; benchmark comparison included; local data caveats apply.

title: NIFTY50 stock basket 30-day Bollinger lower-to-upper reversal
instrument: locally available NIFTY50 stock daily OHLC universe, equal-weight all active signals
rules: Universe/instrument: locally available NIFTY50 stock daily OHLC universe, equal-weight all active signals. Signal: 30-day Bollinger Bands, middle=SMA30, upper/lower=±2 rolling std. Entry: next session open after close crosses below lower band. Exit: next session open after close crosses above upper band. Sizing: equal-weight among active names, no leverage. Costs/slippage: 5 bps on portfolio turnover. Data: local NIFTY50 stock cache. Benchmarks over comparable span: NIFTY buy-and-hold ~9.1% CAGR / -17.2% DD; daily rebalanced equal-weight local stock universe ~20.0% CAGR / -16.9% DD.
verdict: Promising but not deployment-ready: beat local equal-weight stock buy-and-hold in this survivorship-prone sample, with similar drawdown; needs PIT constituents, liquidity checks, and train/test validation.
caveats: Survivorship/constituent cache caveat; all active signals equally weighted. Filtered bad OHLC rows across stocks: 0.

title: NIFTY 50 RSI(14) oversold-to-overbought reversal proxy
instrument: NIFTY 50 index daily OHLC signal-validation proxy
rules: Universe/instrument: NIFTY 50 index daily OHLC signal-validation proxy. Signal: 14-day Wilder RSI; oversold threshold 30, overbought threshold 70. Entry: next session open after RSI crosses below 30. Exit: next session open after RSI crosses above 70. Sizing: 100% notional while long. Costs/slippage: 5 bps per side. Data: local NIFTY index cache, positive OHLC validated. Benchmark: NIFTY buy-and-hold over same span returned ~179% / 9.9% CAGR / -38.4% max DD.
verdict: Reject as standalone rule: high trade win rate but very low CAGR versus buy-and-hold; strict RSI 70 exit creates long idle/holding regimes.
caveats: Index is not directly tradable; no stop/time exit added beyond sourced 30/70 thresholds. Filtered bad OHLC rows: 0.

title: NIFTY 50 50/200 SMA golden-cross trend proxy
instrument: NIFTY 50 index daily OHLC signal-validation proxy
rules: Universe/instrument: NIFTY 50 index daily OHLC signal-validation proxy. Signal: 50-day SMA crossing above/below 200-day SMA on close. Entry: next session open after 50SMA crosses above 200SMA. Exit: next session open after 50SMA crosses below 200SMA. Sizing: 100% notional while long. Costs/slippage: 5 bps on entry and 5 bps on exit/turnover. Data: local NIFTY index cache, positive OHLC validated. Benchmark: NIFTY buy-and-hold over same span returned ~179% / 9.9% CAGR / -38.4% max DD.
verdict: Reject as standalone index rule: it materially underperformed NIFTY buy-and-hold and had slightly worse drawdown, despite low turnover.
caveats: Index is not directly tradable; use futures/ETF execution validation. Filtered bad OHLC rows: 0. Close-derived signals fill at next open.

title: NIFTY 50 Bollinger+RSI mean reversion
rules: Long next open when prior close is below 20-day lower Bollinger Band, RSI14<30, and volume >1.5x 20-day average. Exit via conservative intraday stop -3%, target +5%, or next open on close crossing above SMA20. Max 10 concurrent equal-risk slots.
caveats: Parsed from prior daily scout HTML; first-pass daily-bar research.

title: 20/60 SMA crossover on NIFTY
instrument: NIFTY index proxy (QuantInsti discusses Nifty/options; tested underlying index rule)
rules: Buy next open when SMA20 crosses above SMA60; exit next open when SMA20 crosses below SMA60. Long-only, one position at a time.
caveats: Parsed from prior daily scout HTML; first-pass daily-bar research.

title: 2-period RSI mean reversion on NIFTY
instrument: NIFTY index proxy (signal validation; index not directly tradable)
rules: Long next open after RSI(2)<5, exit next open after RSI(2)>50; short next open after RSI(2)>95, cover next open after RSI(2)<50. One position at a time.
caveats: Parsed from prior daily scout HTML; first-pass daily-bar research.

title: NIFTY 50 Bollinger+RSI mean reversion
rules: Long next open when prior close is below 20-day lower Bollinger Band, RSI14<30, and volume >1.5x 20-day average. Exit via conservative intraday stop -3%, target +5%, or next open/available open on SMA20 cross. Max 10 concurrent equal-risk slots. Short leg not tested because local execution route is long-only first pass.
caveats: Parsed from prior daily scout HTML; first-pass daily-bar research.

title: 20/60 SMA crossover on NIFTY
instrument: NIFTY index proxy (QuantInsti discusses Nifty/options; tested underlying index rule)
rules: Buy next open when SMA20 crosses above SMA60; exit next open when SMA20 crosses below SMA60. Long-only, one position at a time.
caveats: Parsed from prior daily scout HTML; first-pass daily-bar research.

title: 2-period RSI mean reversion on NIFTY
instrument: NIFTY index proxy (signal validation; index not directly tradable)
rules: Long next open after RSI(2)<5, exit next open after RSI(2)>50; short next open after RSI(2)>95, cover next open after RSI(2)<50. One position at a time.
caveats: Parsed from prior daily scout HTML; first-pass daily-bar research.
